title: The Barren Conquest
description: Explore the Nether Roof, a new dimension with 3 distinctive biomes. There you will find new, blocks, materials, mobs and allies.
body:
### **The Barren Conquest**
- Explore The Nether Roof, a new dimension between the nether and the overworld. To access to this dimension, you will have to find enought "Soul Stone", and craft the "Ignited Star", to create the portal to the Roof.
- The Nether Roof has 3 different biomes; "The Barren", wich is the most common; "The Yellow Forest"; And "The Soul sand Peaks", the most rare biome.
- Each biome has is own structures, mobs and distinctive characteristics. The barren and yellow forest are warm places, but the soul sand peaks is a freezing biome.
- In the deeps of the world, the most dangerous dungeons are waiting for a new chalenger. These are 3 different dungeons; The temple, a small dungeon; The Apollyon Fortress, a dungeon with a new boss, Apollyon.
- And last, theres a different dungeon, in this dungeon awaits the final boss, this dungeon is "Satan's Catacomb", where Satan waits you.
